name: Button
intent: CTA / secondary / icon button。3階層ヒエラルキー。

contained.tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium bg-primary-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-primary-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

outlined.tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

brand-outline.description: ブランド色のアウトライン。Contained の次に強いセカンダリ（フォロー/状態トグル等）。slate の outlined より主張が強い
brand-outline.tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium text-primary-500 bg-white border border-primary-500 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

neutral.description: ニュートラル（同スタイル並列配置 OK）
neutral.tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors cursor-pointer

lighted.description: ライテッド（Neutralとペアで使用）
lighted.tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium bg-primary-50 text-primary-500 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer

danger.tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-red-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

subtle.description: 最小限の視覚的存在感
subtle.tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium text-slate-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

disabled.description: 操作不可。全 variant 共通。
disabled.ariaChanges: disabled 属性 + aria-disabled="true"。hover/focus は効かせない。

loading.description: 非同期処理中。全 variant 共通。
loading.htmlNote: label 前にスピナーを prepend（スピナーのクラスは htmlSample/anatomy 側で表現。htmlNote は prose でリンタ非対象）。

htmlSample.contained: <button class="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium bg-primary-500 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-primary-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer">保存</button>
htmlSample.outlined: <button class="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer">キャンセル</button>
htmlSample.brand-outline: <button class="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 px-4 text-[1rem] font-medium text-primary-500 bg-white border border-primary-500 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer">フォロー</button>
htmlSample.iconOnly: <button class="w-10 h-10 inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer" aria-label="閉じる"><svg class="w-5 h-5 fill-current text-body" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><use href="assets/icons/Close.svg#icon"/></svg></button>
